test.command: cd C:\exp\puzzle-solver && uv run pytest tests/ -v

lint.command: cd C:\exp\puzzle-solver && uv run ruff check src tests

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document a shared alias-resolution pattern/helper location for canonical-name-or-alias matching used by script-analysis and matrix surfaces.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The alias-aware-analysis review found duplicated canonical-or-alias matching logic in `src/ui/pages/scripts.py` and `src/ui/pages/matrix.py`, while `.factory/library/patterns.md` and mission guidance do not describe a reusable pattern.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Record that `save_script_analysis(...)` is a boolean persistence contract and UI callers must branch on failure instead of proceeding with success UI.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The save-failure review found `src/ui/pages/scripts.py` now depends on the boolean return from `save_script_analysis(...)`, but `.factory/library/patterns.md` does not document this script-analysis flow expectation.
